D

Debugger - Class in microui.util
Debugging utility class for managing debug mode settings.
debugOnDraw() - Method in class microui.layout.GridLayout
Draws debug visualization showing grid cell boundaries.
debugOnDraw() - Method in class microui.layout.LayoutManager
Draws debug information for the layout.
debugOnDraw() - Method in class microui.layout.LinearAxisLayout
Draws debug visualization of the layout.
DEFAULT_ID - Static variable in class microui.core.base.View
Default numeric identifier for View objects.
DEFAULT_SIZE - Static variable in class microui.component.CheckBox
Default size of the CheckBox in pixels.
DEFAULT_SPEED - Static variable in class microui.util.Timer
Default speed value for the timer.
DEFAULT_TEXT_ID - Static variable in class microui.core.base.View
Default text identifier for View objects.
DEFAULT_WEIGHT_BOTTOM - Static variable in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Default bottom shadow weight (intensity).
DEFAULT_WEIGHT_LEFT - Static variable in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Default left shadow weight (intensity).
DEFAULT_WEIGHT_RIGHT - Static variable in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Default right shadow weight (intensity).
DEFAULT_WEIGHT_TOP - Static variable in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Default top shadow weight (intensity).
Direction - Enum Class in microui.constants
Enumeration representing the four cardinal directions for UI navigation and movement.
dist(float, float, float, float) - Static method in class microui.util.MathUtils
Calculates the Euclidean distance between two points.
DOT - Enum constant in enum class microui.component.CheckBox.CheckStyle
Displays a dot.
DOUBLE_CLICK - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Double click event (EDGE).
DOWN - Enum constant in enum class microui.constants.Direction
Down direction, typically used for moving cursor down or scrolling down.
DRAG_END - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Drag end event (EDGE).
DRAG_START - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Drag start event (EDGE).
DRAGGING - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Dragging state (LEVEL).
draw() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Draws the component and processes interactions.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Draws the ContainerManager and debug information if enabled.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager.Render
Called by Processing's draw cycle to render the ContainerManager.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Draws the component with shadow effects and debug information.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Draws the SpatialView and manages update hooks and animations.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.base.View
Renders the element if it is visible.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.effect.Hover
Draws the hover effect if enabled.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.effect.Ripples
Draws the ripple effect if enabled.
draw() - Method in class microui.core.ImageBuffer
Draws the image buffer if an image is loaded.
draw(PGraphics) - Method in class microui.core.BufferedView
Renders the view to the specified graphics buffer if visible.
DuplicateItemException - Exception in microui.core.exception
Exception thrown when attempting to add a duplicate item to a collection or container that does not allow duplicates.
DuplicateItemException(String) - Constructor for exception microui.core.exception.DuplicateItemException
Constructs a DuplicateItemException with the specified detail message.
